message:
feat: initial EdgeQ implementation — serverless columnar query engine on Cloudflare DOs

WASM-first query execution with TS fallback, code-first API (no SQL),
footer-as-index caching, cosine vector search, null bitmap support,
coalesced R2 range reads, aggregation/GROUP BY, and VIP cache pinning.

- master-do: single writer, footer broadcast with pre-parsed column metadata
- query-do: per-region reader, WASM table versioning, LRU eviction by query frequency
- client: code-first TableQuery builder (.filter, .select, .sort, .aggregate, .vector)
- decode: page-level filter pushdown, top-K heap sort, cosine similarity (matches WASM)
- wasm-engine: Zig SIMD compute layer, SQL generation, binary result parser
- footer: Lance protobuf decoder with null count parsing
- 35 tests passing (footer + decode)
